value.found_quote: Preview release 2.0.1 [2] / 19 May 2026 ; 29 days ago ( 19 May 2026 )
value.rationale: The page describes Google Antigravity and references a 2.0 release in the infobox ("Preview release 2.0.1 / 19 May 2026") and cites a blog post "introducing-google-antigravity-2-0", substantiating that Google offers Antigravity 2.0. The page indicates it is a preview release.
